meta.title: BookFlow – Smart Appointment Scheduling for Your Business
meta.description: BookFlow helps service businesses manage appointments, staff, and clients seamlessly. Start your free trial today.

hero.subtitle: BookFlow streamlines scheduling, client management, and reminders so you can focus on what you do best – serving your clients.
hero.badge: Loved by 12,000+ teams · No credit card needed
hero.footerMicrocopy: Free forever for small teams · Upgrade anytime

items.title: Online Booking 24/7
items.description: Clients can book appointments anytime, reducing phone tag and double‑bookings.

items.title: Staff Management
items.description: Assign appointments, track availability, and manage employee schedules in one place.

items.title: Automated SMS Reminders
items.description: Reduce no‑shows with smart reminders sent automatically before appointments.

items.title: Insightful Dashboard
items.description: Real‑time stats on bookings, revenue, and client trends at a glance.

items.title: Role‑Based Access
items.description: Admins, employees, and clients each have secure, tailored workspaces.

items.title: Cloud & Secure
items.description: Your data is encrypted and backed up – access it anywhere, anytime.

items.title: Create Your Account
items.description: Sign up in seconds – no credit card required.

items.title: Set Up Services & Staff
items.description: Add your service menu and invite your team.

items.title: Share Your Booking Link
items.description: Clients can self‑book directly from your website or a shared link.

items.title: Manage & Grow
items.description: Track appointments, send reminders, and watch your business thrive.

items.quote: BookFlow cut our no‑show rate by 40%. The SMS reminders are a game‑changer.
items.name: Sarah Williams

items.quote: Finally a booking system that’s easy for my clients and my team. Setup took less than 10 minutes.
items.name: Michael Kiu

items.quote: The admin dashboard gives me a clear picture of my daily appointments. Highly recommended.
items.name: Lisa Johnson

items.a: Solo includes 1 employee, 25 clients, and no admin accounts. Studio allows 5 employees, 250 clients, and 1 admin account. Business is unlimited – no caps on employees, clients, or admins.
Yes — our free tier covers up to 5 users and unlimited projects. No credit card required.
Most teams are live in under 30 minutes. Our onboarding wizard walks you through every step.

items.q: Can I import data from other tools?
items.a: Absolutely. We support CSV import and direct integrations with Jira, Asana, and Google Sheets.
Paid plans include live chat support. All users get access to our documentation and community forum.

cta.heading: Ready to simplify your scheduling?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of service professionals who already trust BookFlow.
cta.microcopy: No credit card required · Free for small teams
